name: motion-text-loop
title: Text Loop
author: Motion Primitives
description: Cycles between caller-provided text or content children.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Changed autoplay to opt-in by default, stopped its interval for reduced motion, and rendered the current child without a transition.
Skipped interval setup when fewer than two children are present.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import, made autoplay opt-in, and added reduced-motion and empty/single-child interval guards.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper and prevent unrequested or unnecessary timed text changes.
